basis: CIF NWE / Dated Brent physical proxy
note: Brent has fallen to about $73 (WTI below $70, a multi-month low) as the market prices the 60-day U.S.–Iran framework and ample Atlantic-basin supply — even as the Strait re-tightened on 25 June (Iran's IRGC reasserted routing control; transits back toward ~5/day). Physical NWE differentials may firm on the renewed risk, but flat price is lower, so this estimate tracks the softer benchmark. Editorial proxy, not a traded quote — treat as indicative, and watch tanker-transit data over the rhetoric.
